title: Enemy on Board
summary: A tactical social deduction game system built for dramatic pacing and readable pressure.

content.text: The project focuses on orchestrating uncertainty with clear visual communication and low latency interactions.

content.caption: Atmosphere and readability tuned for high-pressure rounds.

featuredDetails.problem: Deduction games lose tension when readability and pacing diverge.
featuredDetails.approach: Built synchronized systems for role states, events, and round telemetry with fast UI feedback.
featuredDetails.impact: Higher session retention and cleaner decision-making under pressure.

title: CloudSync Utility
summary: Distributed pipeline for creative teams shipping assets daily.

content.text: A prototype focused on reducing friction in remote collaboration and build iteration loops.
